Container.Name: ruckus-unleashed-exporter
Container.Overview: Prometheus metrics exporter for Ruckus Unleashed. Scrapes the Unleashed AJAX API and exposes per-AP, per-radio, per-client, and per-SSID metrics.
Container.Changes:
###2026-05-23 - Added 8 new per-client session traffic metrics: TX/RX bytes, TX/RX packets, TX retries, RX CRC errors, TX data drops, and session duration - Per-client byte/packet counters reset to zero on client reconnect (Gauge semantics — expected behaviour for infrequent reconnects) - Updated Grafana dashboard with new Client Traffic row: per-client throughput time series, session TX/RX bar gauges, and session duration bar gauge
###2026-03-29 - Added pre-built Grafana dashboard (import from dashboards/ruckus-unleashed.json) - Expanded ruckus_client_protocol_info with additional per-client connection attributes
###2026-03-28 - Added 17 new metrics across radio, client, and VAP categories - Renamed cumulative byte/packet metrics with _total suffix - Added /debug endpoint exposing raw API data with sensitive fields redacted (wpa-passphrase, PSKs, SNMP community strings, etc.) - Fixed ruckus_radio_avg_rssi_dbm sign — was reporting positive magnitude, now correctly negative dBm
###2026-03-26 - Initial release - Per-AP status, uptime, LAN traffic, and reboot counters - Per-radio channel utilization, airtime, throughput, noise floor, and client count - Per-client RSSI, noise floor, and SNR - Per-VAP (SSID) traffic and client counts - System CPU, memory, AP count, and client count

Config.Name: Ruckus Host
Config.Description: IP or hostname of the Unleashed master AP

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR
